nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sira tanager
nodes.summary: Sira tanager（Sira tanager，学名 Stilpnia phillipsi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Between 1969 and 1972, John Terborgh and Weske reported about their collections in the Cerros del Sira on the discovery of this new species of tanager that is related to the black-capped tanager. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
